title: Changelog: Jan 21st - Mar 9th updates
excerpt:

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey community, happy Sunday!
Here’s what’s new in the monday Apps Framework and API from the past two months

Apps Framework:
Changes to the monetization vendor registration process

API:
New page_break type on create_doc_block mutation
New invite_users mutation
Hotfix: Updated complexity budget exhausted error
Hotfix: renewal_date field type change on app subscriptions details object
New end_date field on app subscription details object
Hotfix: Updated create_webhook errors
Deprecated: Sending variables as a JSON string
New update user attributes mutation
Hotfix: Changes to subitems queries
New API analytics dashboard​:party_popper:

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @OmerK - thanks for the update.
At the same time the new API went live our customers started experiencing issues with DocuGen when populating documents with values from mirror columns. Previously (for a long time) DocuGen was able to fetch mirror columns via API. Suddenly starting 48 hours ago our customers started reporting that mirror columns are not populating documents anymore. When we investigated this, we found out the monday.com GraphQL API is returning 500 error. Please look into this as a matter of urgency as we have thousands of customers using DocuGen on a daily basis.

Here is a short video with more details:

@Adnene

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: FYI we did submit a ticket to monday.com app support several hours ago but are yet to receive a response.

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sami Caracand (DocuGen):

Suddenly starting 48 hours ago our customers started reporting that mirror columns are not populating documents anymore. When we investigated this, we found out the monday.com GraphQL API is returning 500 error.

Hey @samicaracand , I’m not aware of 500 errors with the API but for another issue that was fixed (shared on slack).
We’ll look forward to it and update.

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @OmerK

The Slack link is another issue.

However, we have some customers who started reporting a couple of hours ago that the issue resolved itself. I am not sure yet if the issue is fixed for all customers or just some. I will keep you posted. But please makes sure your dev team is aware of this issue due its wide impact on our customers

posts.author: Adnene (Adnene)
posts.cookedHtml: @OmerK I confirm that the query works as expected now.
